
  .-------.                   +
  | START |                  / \       
  '---+---'                 /   \      +-+---------+-+    ___________
      |        .-----.     /     \     | | COMPLEX | |   /           \
      v        | END |<---+CHOICE +--->| |         | |->+ PREPARATION +-> X
   +-------+   '-----'     \     /     | | PROCESS | |   \___________/
  / INPUT /                 \   /      +-+---------+-+ 
 +-------+                   \ /
      |                       +
      v                       ^
 +---------+             +----+----+
 | PROCESS |------------>| PROCESS |<----- x
 +---------+             +---------+
